LanguageData.VPEMYX_PsychicScreamThought.stages.0.des: The abyssal scream shattered my mental defenses.
The void's whispers are drilling through my thoughts.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CognitiveHazardThought.stages.0.d: Trying to focus on that psycaster split my mind with screaming static.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_GlobalLobotomyThought.stages.0.de: The void's truth was hammered directly into my skull.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_WailingAuraThought.stages.0.label: Wailing Resonance
LanguageData.VPEMYX_WailingAuraThought.stages.0.descr: The screaming flesh-field is crushing my nerves.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionDreadThought.stages.0.label: Legion Dread Pressure
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionDreadThought.stages.0.descr: The towering aberration's presence is crushing my mind and nerves.
